stations.name: Central railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable from much of Spring Hill.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Spring Hill via Wickham Terrace, Boundary Street, and the inner-CBD network.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 2 to 5 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Spring Hill has cafes and small dining clusters along Boundary Street and Leichhardt Street. The CBD and Fortitude Valley dining are within walking distance.

pockets.name: Heritage character pocket
pockets.character: Streets with heritage queenslander and worker's cottage stock.

pockets.name: Apartment market
pockets.character: Apartment buildings close to the CBD.

buyer_profile.note: Walk-to-CBD apartment and character home buyers.
Heritage character stock attracts renovation buyers.
